install_cmds: apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git build-essential libosmesa6-dev libgl1-mesa-glx libglew-dev patchelf && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* || true

conda install -y -c conda-forge 'libstdcxx-ng>=12' mesalib glew patchelf || (rm -f /opt/conda/lib/libstdc++.so.6 /opt/conda/lib/libstdc++.so && ln -sf /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6 /opt/conda/lib/libstdc++.so.6)

mkdir -p /root/.mujoco && python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlretrieve('https://github.com/deepmind/mujoco/releases/download/2.1.0/mujoco210-linux-x86_64.tar.gz', '/tmp/mujoco.tar.gz')" && tar --no-same-owner -xzf /tmp/mujoco.tar.gz -C /root/.mujoco/ && rm /tmp/mujoco.tar.gz && ls -la /root/.mujoco/mujoco210/bin/libmujoco210.so
pip install gym==0.25.2 click gtimer numpy mujoco==2.3.7 python-dateutil joblib

MUJOCO_PY_MUJOCO_PATH=/root/.mujoco/mujoco210 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/root/.mujoco/mujoco210/bin:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH} CPATH=/opt/conda/include:${CPATH:-} LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/conda/lib:${LIBRARY_PATH:-} python -c 'import mujoco_py; print("mujoco_py cython ext built:", mujoco_py.__file__)'
local_install_cmds: conda install -y -c conda-forge patchelf glew mesalib
pip install gym==0.25.2 click gtimer numpy mujoco==2.3.7 python-dateutil joblib
